zh.lifeSummary: 當Graine Ó Néill於0925年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 多聶加爾時，她的父親Cornig Ó Néill King of Cormag139歲，母親Mrs. Cornig O Neill Queen of Cormag135歲。她和Diarmid O' Duibhne至少有2個兒子。她去世在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: Ó
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

variants.name: Oh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

nameMeanings.name: Néill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Neil  , also probably representing shortened forms of the derived patronymics   McNeill   or the comparable Irish   O'Neill  .

variants.name: Niel
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Neill  .

variants.name: Neil
meanings: Scottish, English (Lancashire), and Irish (Munster): from the Gaelic personal name Niall (genitive Néill), possibly derived from Irish néal ‘cloud’. In most cases the name probably represents a shortened form of the derived patronymics McNeill or the comparable Irish O'Neill .

nameMeanings.name: Graine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Origin uncertain, possibly connected with grán ‘grain’, as the name of an ancient corn goddess. In Irish legend Gráinne was the daughter of King Cormac.

variants.name: Grania
meanings: Origin uncertain, possibly connected with grán ‘grain’, as the name of an ancient corn goddess. In Irish legend Gráinne was the daughter of King Cormac.

variants.name: Granya
meanings: Origin uncertain, possibly connected with grán ‘grain’, as the name of an ancient corn goddess. In Irish legend Gráinne was the daughter of King Cormac.

en.lifeSummary: When Graine Ó Néill was born in 0925, in County Donegal, Ireland, her father, Cornig Ó Néill King of Cormag, was 139 and her mother, Mrs. Cornig O Neill Queen of Cormag, was 135. She had at least 2 sons with Diarmid O' Duibhne. She died in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Diarmid O' Duibhne. Elle est décédée à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graine Ó Néillが0925年にアイルランドコウントイ ドンエガルで生まれた時，父Cornig Ó Néill King of Cormagは139歳，母Mrs. Cornig O Neill Queen of Cormagは135歳であった。彼女はDiarmid O' Duibhneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女はイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of St. Peter the Deacon Kilchrena: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난
ko.lifeSummary: Graine Ó Néill(이)가 0925년 아일랜드 카운티 도네걸에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cornig Ó Néill King of Cormag(은)는 139세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Cornig O Neill Queen of Cormag(은)는 135세였다. 그녀는 Diarmid O' Duibhne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graine Ó Néill родилась в 0925 г. в местности коунти доунегаль, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Cornig Ó Néill King of Cormag было 139 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Cornig O Neill Queen of Cormag, 135. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Diarmid O' Duibhne. Она умерла в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.
